rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks for component ports must be placed in component type scopes, not implementation scopes
Implementation-level bindings should be placed in implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections are defined
generic_rules: Use visible component ports in type-level contracts; avoid implementation-only subcomponent paths
Ensure AGREE scalar types are declared using int, real, or bool
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must reference visible identifiers from the component's feature set
Guarantee statements should relate visible outputs to visible inputs in component type annexes
anti_patterns: Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type annexes unless represented through variables or outputs
